column1: # ZAP rule tuning for this local API-only service.

column3: Debug errors or stack traces must not be exposed by API responses.
CORS/cross-domain policy misconfiguration can expose payment APIs.
X-Content-Type-Options is handled by Helmet; warn only for local baseline drift.
HSTS requires production HTTPS; local CI DAST runs over HTTP.
Content Security Policy is primarily frontend-specific; this service exposes JSON APIs.
Non-browser API endpoints may not set every browser-oriented cache directive in local DAST.
Cookie SameSite behavior differs between development HTTP and production HTTPS.
